verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Why should we complain about the things we don't want. If there's always a Big God who planned things before we ask.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let Him be a reason for a living cause you are is the reason for dying Everything is nothing if our Lord Jesus Christ Is Missing

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I am Failure He's my forgiver I am sinner and He's my Saviour I am a broken He's my Healer I am His Child and He's my God the greater is He that is in us

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: prayer is our best option not our last option to see is to believe but for God, just believe and you will see God will guide you in the right path
